name: turbowebfetch
description: Turn websites into LLM-ready data, locally. Handles dynamic JS, Cloudflare, and rendering automatically. 14 parallel browsers. Zero API keys.

scripts.postinstall:
echo "
TurboWebFetch — Turn websites into LLM-ready data, locally.

Reliably fetches content where standard tools fail. Handles dynamic JS,
Cloudflare challenges, and rendering automatically. 14 parallel browsers.
Zero API keys.

By Mourtaza Ali | mourtaza.com

Run 'npm run setup:python' to complete setup.
"

author: Mourtaza Ali <aza.a.ali@gmail.com> (https://mourtaza.com)
